flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Gardner-Webb University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.8% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Gardner-Webb University rose 33% between 2021 and 2024 (36.0% → 47.9%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Gardner-Webb University rose 16% between 2021 and 2024 (47.6% → 55.4%).
